Kafka is a playable character in Honkai: Star Rail.

A member of the Stellaron Hunters who is calm, collected, and beautiful. Her record on the wanted list of the Interastral Peace Corporation only lists her name and her hobby. People have always imagined her to be elegant, respectable, and in pursuit of things of beauty even in combat. Who are you now stuck with.. good luck.
creator: Quix
